conventionsSummary.namespace: /admin/*, code tree src/admin/<resource>/ aggregated in a single AdminModule (one app.module.ts registration line total)
conventionsSummary.pagination: offset: ?page=&limit= returning { data, page, total }; app cursor convention untouched
conventionsSummary.errorEnvelope: identical to live API: { error: { code, message, details? }, ...extra } via AppException subclasses through the existing global HttpExceptionFilter
conventionsSummary.dtos: Admin<Entity>View DTOs only; existing app DTOs never reused or widened
conventionsSummary.framework: NestJS 11 + Prisma 6 per protected-registry frameworkProfile; class-validator DTOs, global ValidationPipe, contract specs per resource at src/admin/<resource>/tests/*.contract.spec.ts run under test/run-isolated.sh

adminAuth.tokenDesign: Access 15m / refresh 30d mirroring the live idiom (src/auth/auth-token.service.ts) but with distinct secrets, iss and aud claims. AdminJwtGuard + AdminRolesGuard live in src/admin/common/ and are applied ONLY on /admin/* controllers; the global user guards see /admin routes as @Public()-excluded admin territory via the admin guards' own rejection. Cross-rejection contract-tested both directions: a valid admin token fails JwtAuthGuard (different secret/claims), a valid user token fails AdminJwtGuard.
adminAuth.seed: CLI/seed command creates the first superadmin from env (ADMIN_SEED_EMAIL, ADMIN_SEED_PASSWORD, ADMIN_SEED_NAME); refuses if any AdminUser exists.

roleMatrix.support: read all monitor surfaces; actions limited to retry-reminder and replay-webhook (both audit-logged)
roleMatrix.superadmin: everything, incl. billing reads, plan/bands/credits writes, test-account powers, suspension, admin-user management

endpoints.designNotes: Audit action 'login'. Disabled admins are rejected identically to bad credentials (no enumeration). When mustChangePassword=true the session is issued but every /admin/* endpoint except auth/me/change-password returns 403 FORBIDDEN until the password is changed (per replace-invite-with-create ruling).

errors: 401 UNAUTHENTICATED (invalid/revoked/expired; reuse revokes the admin's whole chain, mirroring the live rotation idiom)

endpoints.designNotes: Rotation + reuse detection copied from the live RefreshToken idiom, on admin_refresh_tokens only.
Serves the login footer org copy (static 'OweMe' in the DTO) and the admins screen 'You' badge / self-disable client guard. The server-side self-disable refusal lives on AdminUserManagement.

body.newPassword: string (required, min length per codebase convention)

endpoints.designNotes: Clears mustChangePassword; revokes all other live admin refresh tokens for the actor. Required leg of the create-with-temp-password ruling.

APPEND-ONLY invariant (audit-log-need-3): this resource exposes NO create/update/delete endpoint; rows are written exclusively by other endpoints' audit hook. business-detail's action-log panel is this endpoint filtered by targetBusinessId. Reads gracefully from the empty table (data: [], total: 0).
id+name enumeration only, for the filter dropdown. Deliberately NOT the superadmin-gated admin-users management list: support can see who acted without seeing emails/status.

AdminAuditEntryView.actionType: string (kebab verb, e.g. grant-credits, force-plan, set-enterprise-bands, test-flag, reset-test, suspend, unsuspend, retry-reminder, replay-webhook, create-admin, disable-admin, enable-admin, revoke-admin, reveal-otp, login, change-password)

resources.name: AdminSchemaFoundation
resources.designNotes: Schema-only resource: creates usage_events, otp_request_log, otp_test_codes, webhook_event_log and the additive Business columns (isTest, enterpriseBands, suspendedAt) plus optional RefreshToken.revokedReason. Additive Prisma migration; existing app ORM layer must still compile and boot. No route, no module logic beyond the migration. Population of the event tables is a LATER fenced instrumentation task (see instrumentation[]); every admin read over these tables must render truthfully from empty.

resources.name: AdminOverview
resources.basedOn: Business, Subscription, Plan, CreditLedger, Payment, BillingTransaction

endpoints.designNotes: MRR = sum of Plan.pricePerMonth over active paid subscriptions; enterprise band premium is NOT priced server-side (price math 25000 + 12500 x bands is display-side per ruling) so enterpriseBandsTotal is returned for the client to add the band component. Credits burned = sum over ledgers of (effective grant - balance) clamped >= 0 for the current period (fair-use -1 ledgers excluded). Pay-link figures = Payment rows with method 'Paystack link'; commission derived via the live pay-link-fees.ts formula (1% capped N500), never persisted. Aggregate read only, no ledger refill side effect is triggered (raw queries, not the app's lazily-refilling UsageService).

Implemented as a read-time UNION view (no new table): Business.createdAt -> 'Business registered'; BillingTransaction kind 'subscription' -> 'Subscription payment'; kind 'credits-bundle' -> 'Credit bundle purchased'; Payment method 'Paystack link' -> 'Pay link recovery'. Fixture-only event kinds with no live source (BVUM ceiling hit, payout account verified) are omitted until instrumented; the feed is honest about what exists and empty-safe.

AdminOverviewView.enterpriseBandsTotal: number (sum of Business.enterpriseBands; band price math display-side)
AdminOverviewView.planCounts: { starter: number, market: number, business: number, wholesale: number, enterprise: number }

endpoints.designNotes: status derives server-side: test (isTest), suspended (suspendedAt != null), else active; the dashboard's 'paused' filter maps to 'suspended' per gap-5 ruling. bvumKobo computed by the same open-principal definition BvumService uses, via read-only queries. ceilingKobo = bvumCeilingOverride ?? Plan.bvumCeiling. creditsGrant null when ledger grant is -1 (enterprise fair use). Owner phone masked server-side (last 4 digits). Unfiltered 'total' in the envelope serves the subtitle count.

subscriptionState uses the LIVE entitlement vocabulary none|pending|active|gracePeriod|expired (never the fixture's active|grace|canceled). Band pricing is display-side; the DTO carries extraBands plus base and effective ceilings only. bundleCapPerMonth exposed from the live constant (2).

Per-type counts (sends/parses/insights) read from usage_events for the current ledger period; all zero until the instrumentation task lands (greenlight-via-event-tables ruling). usedCredits falls back to ledger derivation (grant + bonus - balance) so the aggregate meter wires even with an empty event table.
Status uses the live derived vocabulary from the registry's DebtView derivation (open|partial|overdue|paid|archived), not the fixture vocab; createdAt desc.

AdminCreditUsageView.bonusCredits: number (balance in excess of the period grant, floor 0)

endpoints.designNotes: Admin-scoped catalog read (GET /plans sits behind the user guard and cross-rejects admin tokens by design). Ladder order fixed: starter, market, business, wholesale, enterprise.

Customer identity minimised server-side: first name + masked phone only (fragment privacy note). remindersSent = count of Reminder rows for the debt; daysToRecovery = paidAt-of-settling-payment minus createdAt, null while unpaid. Status vocabulary is the live derived one; the dashboard's filter options map at wiring.
Month-relative server-side (current calendar month), never a hardcoded month prefix.
method is served VERBATIM as stored ('Paystack link' plus free-text client labels); the dashboard maps/labels client-side rather than the server inventing a vocabulary.

sendsThisMonth/smsSendsThisMonth from Reminder rows. deliveredThisMonth is null: BulkSMS dispatch is fire-and-forget with no receipts (registry); the card ships HONEST-EMPTY per ruling. smsCostThisMonthKobo = sum of usage_events.costKoboEstimate on type 'send' this month, null when no rows exist yet. creditsPerSend from CREDIT_WEIGHTS (5), served not hardcoded.

Status vocabulary is the live scheduled|sent|failed. step is null (schedule steps are derived on the fly, not stored). costKoboEstimate joins usage_events via meta.reminderId once instrumented; null meanwhile.

Greenlit ORPHAN: weekly avg of usage_events.costKoboEstimate over type 'send' rows that carry a cost. Weeks with no data return costPerSmsAvgKobo null; an entirely empty table returns all-null points, which the sparkline renders as its honest empty state. No provider-billing integration implied.

AdminReminderStatsView.deliveredThisMonth: number|null (no delivery receipts exist; always null in v1)

endpoints.designNotes: Superadmin-only per conventions billing matrix. State vocabulary is the LIVE none|pending|active|gracePeriod|expired. source is null: platform is observed only at verify time and never persisted; the source filter renders truthfully disabled until a source field is ever ruled in.

grossKobo = recorded amount (0 on webhook-recorded bundle rows, per registry); catalogPriceKobo joins bundle-catalog.ts / Plan.pricePerMonth so the UI can show list price beside the recorded amount. storeFeeKobo/netKobo are null: no store-fee derivation has been ruled (open followUp billing-fee-derivation); columns ship honest-null, never invented percentages.
failedRenewals maps to expired-this-month transitions observable from webhook_event_log iap rows once instrumented; null meanwhile. storeFeeMonthKobo null pending the fee-derivation followUp.

gap-2 add-to-scope: entitlementStateCounts sweeps Subscription NOW (works day one); the transitions feed reads webhook_event_log source 'iap' (eventType SUBSCRIBED/DID_RENEW/EXPIRED/CANCELLED/DID_FAIL_TO_RENEW/REVOKE/GRACE_PERIOD_EXPIRED, outcome ok|ignored|error) and is empty until the webhook instrumentation lands. Store-driven fail-closed downgrades to starter become visible here.

AdminSubscriptionView.source: null (not persisted; honest null in v1)

AdminBillingTransactionView.grossKobo: number (recorded amount; may be 0 on webhook rows)

AdminBillingStatsView.mrrKobo: number (flat plan component; band premium display-side)

AdminIapLifecycleView.entitlementStateCounts: { none: number, pending: number, active: number, gracePeriod: number, expired: number }

endpoints.designNotes: grantedThisMonth sums current-period ledger grants (fair-use -1 excluded). burnedThisMonth from ledger derivation (wires the total even with empty event tables). burnByType from usage_events grouped by type with per-event weights from CREDIT_WEIGHTS; empty array until instrumented (greenlight-via-event-tables ruling), which the 'Burn by type' BarList renders as its honest empty state.
Ranked by used (grant + bonus - balance) descending; fairUse = grant -1.
credits parsed from the oweme_credits_(n) SKU pattern; priceKobo from the bundle-catalog join because webhook-recorded rows carry amount 0 (registry).

Single source of truth for constants the dashboard must never hardcode: bundle cap (2), CREDIT_WEIGHTS (send 5, voiceParse 1, insightOrRisk 4 - the CODE truth per the maintenance pass), SKU catalog from src/billing/bundle-catalog.ts, per-plan grants from Plan.creditsPerMonth.

AdminCreditsConfigView.creditWeights: { send: number, voiceParse: number, insightOrRisk: number }
AdminCreditsConfigView.bundles: { sku: string, credits: number, priceKobo: number }[]

endpoints.designNotes: Rows are Payment method 'Paystack link'. Fee split (combined fee, OweMe commission, processor share) computed SERVER-side from the live pay-link-fees.ts formulas at read time (never persisted, never client-computed). status is 'success' for every row: the webhook records successes only (registry); no pending/failed rows exist to show, stated in the DTO.
Month parameterised server aggregate, never a hardcoded month prefix.

response.shape: Paged<AdminWebhookEventView> + errorCount: number (unfiltered errors, for the section subtitle)

endpoints.designNotes: Reads webhook_event_log; empty (data: [], total: 0, errorCount: 0) until the webhook instrumentation lands, which the table renders as its honest empty state.

query.search: string? (business, bank or account name contains)

endpoints.designNotes: NUBAN masked SERVER-side (****+last 4) fixing the fragment's client-side-masking defect. bankName resolved from bankCode via the same bank list the live GET /banks serves. subaccountActive = Business.paystackSubaccount != null. Settlement fields are null per the partial-honest-empty ruling (settlement is provider-side; no source exists).

partial-honest-empty ruling: payoutAccountsSetUpCount and activeSubaccountCount wire from real rows; settlement figures and failed-resolution counts are null (resolve failures return 422 and are never stored) and their stat cards ship HONEST-EMPTY until a settlement feed exists.

AdminPayoutStatsView.failedAccountResolutionCount: number|null (null in v1; 422 resolve failures are not persisted)

endpoints.designNotes: Reads otp_request_log (greenlight-via-event-tables ruling). deliverySuccessPct is null while all delivery outcomes are 'delivered-unknown' (BulkSMS reports nothing back); displayed honestly per ruling. Zeros/null from the empty table until instrumentation lands.
Daily request counts from otp_request_log; unlike OtpCode, log rows survive verify-time hard deletes, so the series does not undercount.
Phones stored and served MASKED (otp_request_log.phoneMasked); full numbers never enter the log.

Server-side filter isTest = true is structural (conventions power 2). Lists phone + current-code expiry state ONLY; codes are NEVER bulk-shipped with the list (surf-6 note) - reveal is the separate audited AdminOtpReveal action.

gap-1 add-to-scope: read-only aggregation over RefreshToken rows (live sessions, revocations, rotation chains via rotatedFrom). Reuse-vs-logout revocation reason is NOT stored today: reasoned counts are null until the optional RefreshToken.revokedReason instrumentation lands; raw revocation counts and the recent-revocations feed work day one.

AdminOtpStatsView.deliverySuccessPct: number|null (null while provider reports no receipts)

AdminTestNumberView.phone: string (full; test-flagged businesses only, superadmin only)

endpoints.designNotes: Reads usage_events type 'voiceParse' (greenlight-via-event-tables). Backend only ever sees FALLBACK parses; on-device parses never reach the server (client heuristic), so onDeviceParses/onDeviceSharePct are null unless the app ever reports them (app-side change, flagged as followUp, out of admin scope). modelSpendEstimateKobo sums costKoboEstimate when recorded, else null. Zeros/null from the empty table.
Weekly counts of usage_events type 'voiceParse'; all-zero points from the empty table.
Monthly rollup of usage_events grouped by businessId (types voiceParse + insight). insight counts stay 0 while the insights endpoints remain 501 scaffolds.

METADATA-ONLY per final ruling: time, business, outcome, credits. Transcripts are NEVER stored anywhere and NEVER appear in usage_events.meta for voiceParse rows; the instrumentation entry for voice.service must record outcome metadata only. The dashboard transcript column is removed at wiring.

gap-4 add-to-scope: tombstone coverage (Customer.deleted, Debt.deleted counts), newest updatedAt per business as a sync-recency proxy (no per-device cursor is stored server-side; stated in the DTO), and the registry-documented Payment limitation surfaced verbatim for support: POST /debts/:id/undo-payment hard-deletes the Payment with NO tombstone, silently desyncing offline devices. Read-only; fixing the limitation is protected-surface work, out of admin scope.

AdminSyncHealthView.totals: { customerTombstones: number, debtTombstones: number, archivedDebts: number }

endpoints.designNotes: The dashboard's 'invited' status maps to status active + mustChangePassword true + lastLoginAt null (pendingFirstLogin in the DTO) per the replace-invite-with-create ruling.

replace-invite-with-create ruling: server generates a temp password, returns it ONCE in this response (never retrievable again), sets mustChangePassword=true. No email is sent; no email provider exists or is wanted. Invite-email copy on the screen is CUT/replaced at wiring.
Also revokes all live admin refresh tokens for the target.

errors: 422 VALIDATION_ERROR (target has logged in at least once; disable instead)

endpoints.designNotes: Revoke-invite analog: hard delete permitted ONLY for never-activated accounts (lastLoginAt null); activated accounts must be disabled, preserving audit-log actor referential integrity. Audit row records the removed email.

AdminUserView.name: string
AdminUserView.pendingFirstLogin: boolean (mustChangePassword && lastLoginAt null; renders as the screen's 'invited' state)

writesExisting: CreditLedger.balance (increment via the existing creditCredits semantics; DECLARED EXCEPTION, see writesExistingExceptions)
endpoints.designNotes: Conventions power 3. Must go through the registry-mandated creditCredits increment path to preserve carry-over semantics; never sets balance absolutely.

writesExisting: Subscription.activePlanId/entitlementState (lockstep update mandated by registry sideEffects warning; DECLARED EXCEPTION)
endpoints.designNotes: Sales provisioning path (conventions power 3, allowed on non-test businesses). Registry warns out-of-band plan edits diverge Business.plan from Subscription: this endpoint keeps both in lockstep. Holds until next renewal; store-driven webhook lifecycle can later overwrite it, stated in the audit note.

writesExisting: Business.bvumCeilingOverride (derived ceiling written alongside, per task ruling)
endpoints.designNotes: bvumCeilingOverride = enterprise base ceiling + extraBands x band ceiling increment (N40M base + N20M per band per the businesses fragment). Price math (25000 + 12500 x bands) is display-side only; no price is persisted.

body.confirm: string (required, must equal the business name)

response.shape: { ok: true, cleared: { debts: number, payments: number, reminders: number } }
errors: 403 FORBIDDEN (business is NOT test-flagged; refusal is server-side and structural)

writesExisting: Debt/Payment/Reminder rows of the TEST business (hard wipe permitted ONLY behind isTest; DECLARED EXCEPTION)
CreditLedger (reset to plan grant, bonus removed; DECLARED EXCEPTION)
endpoints.designNotes: Conventions power 4. The isTest check happens inside the same transaction as the wipe. Contradicts app soft-delete rules by explicit owner approval, test-flagged rows only.

gap-5 add-to-scope. Sets suspendedAt=now. The APP-SIDE ENFORCEMENT (blocking new debt creation for suspended businesses; collection never blocked, mirroring BVUM philosophy) is a PROTECTED-surface change to src/debts/debts.service.ts and is OUT of admin scope: recorded as followUp 'suspension-enforcement' for the owner. Until that lands, suspension is a recorded state the dashboard reflects.
Second endpoint of the gap-5 suspension lifecycle (same gap id, same resource).

errors: 422 VALIDATION_ERROR (row not 'failed', or whatsapp: no server WhatsApp API)
403 PLAN_REQUIRED (target business credits exhausted; row stays failed)

writesExisting: Reminder.status/sentAt (via the existing retry semantics, cross-tenant; DECLARED EXCEPTION)
CreditLedger (5-credit re-debit of the TARGET business, existing debit semantics; DECLARED EXCEPTION)
endpoints.designNotes: Conventions-approved support action. Reuses the live retry semantics read-only-imported from RemindersService (sms only; re-debits 5 trader credits and dispatches a REAL SMS - the audit row records both side effects). Wiring must surface the re-debit consequence in the confirm UI.

response.shape: AdminWebhookEventView (the new outcome row appended by the replay)

writesExisting: Via the existing WebhooksService processing of the stored payload (Payment/Notification/Subscription writes exactly as a live delivery, idempotent on reference; DECLARED EXCEPTION)
endpoints.designNotes: Conventions-approved support action. Requires webhook_event_log.detail to retain the verified payload for error-outcome rows (instrumentation entry does this). Replay re-invokes the same processing path a live delivery uses (signature already verified at capture time), appends a fresh log row with the new outcome, and audit-logs the actor. Error rows only.

errors: 404 NOT_FOUND (no business, business not test-flagged, or no active code - indistinguishable by design)

endpoints.designNotes: Conventions power 2. OtpCode stores only codeHash (registry ADMIN RISK); real users' hashing is NEVER weakened. Reveal reads the otp_test_codes SIDE TABLE, populated ONLY at issuance time and ONLY when the phone resolves to an isTest business (instrumentation entry in auth.service). The reveal query joins Business.isTest=true server-side, so a real user's code is structurally unreachable even if a stray side-table row existed. POST (not GET) because every reveal writes an audit row ('reveal-otp').

newTables.columns: id String @id (UUIDv7, server-minted), email String @unique, name String, passwordHash String (hash per codebase crypto convention, src/auth/auth.crypto.ts idiom), role String ('superadmin'|'support'), status String ('active'|'disabled'), mustChangePassword Boolean @default(true), lastLoginAt DateTime?, lastActiveAt DateTime?, createdAt DateTime @default(now()), updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt
newTables.purpose: Separate admin identity (skill law 5); never touches user Staff/OtpCode/RefreshToken machinery.
newTables.writtenBy: AdminAuth (login stamps lastLoginAt/lastActiveAt, change-password), AdminUserManagement (create/disable/enable/delete), seed command

newTables.columns: id String @id, adminUserId String, tokenHash String @unique, rotatedFrom String?, revokedAt DateTime?, expiresAt DateTime, createdAt DateTime @default(now())
newTables.purpose: Admin session rotation + reuse detection, mirroring the live RefreshToken idiom on a fully separate table/secret.

newTables.columns: id String @id, adminUserId String, adminNameSnapshot String, adminRoleSnapshot String, actionType String, action String, targetType String?, targetId String?, targetBusinessId String?, before Json?, after Json?, note String?, createdAt DateTime @default(now())
newTables.purpose: Owner-approved append-only audit store; written by EVERY admin write endpoint; no update/delete path exists anywhere.
newTables.writtenBy: audit hook invoked by all auditLogged:true endpoints

newTables.columns: id String @id, businessId String, type String ('send'|'voiceParse'|'insight'), credits Int, costKoboEstimate Int?, meta Json?, createdAt DateTime @default(now()) — index (businessId, createdAt), (type, createdAt)
newTables.purpose: Append-only per-debit event log (greenlight-via-event-tables ruling): powers per-type burn, AI stats, send stats, SMS cost estimates (costKoboEstimate per rulings.orphans reminders-need-3).
newTables.writtenBy: PROTECTED-path instrumentation ONLY (see instrumentation[]; later fenced task). Admin endpoints read gracefully from empty.

newTables.columns: id String @id, phoneMasked String, businessId String?, outcome String ('requested'|'delivered-unknown'|'verified'|'failed'|'rate-limited'), attempts Int @default(0), createdAt DateTime @default(now()) — index (createdAt), (outcome, createdAt)
newTables.purpose: Persistent OTP request/outcome log (ruling): survives OtpCode's delete-on-verify, records throttle blocks, stores phones MASKED only. Delivery recorded as far as the provider reports; otherwise 'delivered-unknown', displayed honestly.

newTables.columns: phone String @id, codePlain String, expiresAt DateTime, createdAt DateTime @default(now())
newTables.purpose: Plaintext OTP side-table for TEST-FLAGGED businesses ONLY, per conventions power 2 and the task ruling: populated solely at issuance when the phone maps to Business.isTest=true; real users' hashed-at-rest OtpCode semantics untouched. Rows deleted alongside the consume/deleteMany at verify.
newTables.writtenBy: PROTECTED-path instrumentation ONLY (auth.service issuance + consume). Read by AdminOtpReveal with a server-side isTest join.

newTables.columns: id String @id, source String ('paystack'|'iap'), eventType String, reference String?, outcome String ('ok'|'ignored'|'error'), detail Json? (verified payload retained for error rows to enable replay), createdAt DateTime @default(now()) — index (source, createdAt), (outcome, createdAt)
newTables.purpose: Persisted webhook event store (ruling): powers the pay-links webhook table, error counter, replay action and the gap-2 IAP lifecycle panel.
newTables.writtenBy: PROTECTED-path instrumentation (webhooks.service paystack + iap handlers) AND AdminWebhookActions replay (appends the replay outcome row).

newColumns.purpose: Test-account flag (conventions power 1); server-side structural filter for every test-only power.
Additive band count for rev 2 enterprise banding; price math (25000 + 12500 x bands) stays display-side.
newColumns.writtenBy: POST /admin/businesses/:id/enterprise-bands (which also writes the derived bvumCeilingOverride)

newColumns.purpose: gap-5 suspension lifecycle state; enforcement in debts.service is a flagged followUp, not admin scope.
Lets the gap-1 session panel distinguish reuse-detection revocations from logout revocations; panel works without it (reasoned counts null).
newColumns.writtenBy: NOT written by any admin endpoint; future protected-path instrumentation only (auth.service refresh()/logout())

instrumentation.targetPath: create() metered immediate-send branch (registry evidence lines 100-158, after the 5-credit debit + successful dispatch)
instrumentation.writes: { businessId, type:'send', credits:5, costKoboEstimate: provider estimate when available else null, meta:{ reminderId, channel } }

instrumentation.targetPath: cron delivery success path (touchDebt vicinity), one write per successful scheduled dispatch
instrumentation.writes: { businessId, type:'send', credits:5, costKoboEstimate, meta:{ reminderId, channel, scheduled:true } }
{ businessId, type:'send', credits:5, costKoboEstimate, meta:{ reminderId, retry:true } }

instrumentation.targetPath: success-only debit point (debit 1 credit on success, per registry)
instrumentation.writes: { businessId, type:'voiceParse', credits:1, costKoboEstimate: LLM cost estimate when computable else null, meta:{ outcome } } — meta MUST NOT contain the transcript (metadata-only ruling)

instrumentation.targetPath: future: when the 501 scaffolds go live, at their CREDIT_WEIGHTS.insightOrRisk=4 debit point
instrumentation.writes: { businessId, type:'insight', credits:4, meta:{ kind } } — no-op today; recorded so the unscaffolding task inherits the obligation

instrumentation.targetPath: requestOtp (registry evidence lines 45-59): one row per request with outcome 'requested' (or 'rate-limited' when the silent 30/phone/min or 120/ip/min throttle swallows it)
instrumentation.writes: { phoneMasked, businessId: resolved when the phone maps to an existing business else null, outcome, attempts:0 }

instrumentation.targetPath: verifyOtp (registry evidence lines 62-92): outcome 'verified' on success, 'failed' on wrong/expired code, with the attempt count
code issuance inside requestOtp (lines 45-59): upsert plaintext code ONLY when the phone resolves to a Business with isTest=true; plus delete alongside the deleteMany({phone}) consume at line 87
instrumentation.writes: { phone, codePlain, expiresAt } — structurally never written for non-test businesses

instrumentation.targetPath: paystack handler (registry evidence lines 102-190): one row per verified delivery with eventType, data.reference, outcome ok|ignored|error (error rows retain the verified payload in detail for replay)
iap handler (registry evidence lines 200-277): one row per delivery with notificationType, outcome ok|ignored (no tenant binding)|error
instrumentation.writes: { source:'iap', eventType: notificationType, reference: store transaction id, outcome, detail }

instrumentation.targetPath: refresh() reuse-detection chain revoke ('reuse'), rotation revoke ('rotation'), logout() ('logout')
instrumentation.writes: one-word reason string on the existing revoke updates — OPTIONAL fidelity upgrade for gap-1; the sessions panel functions without it

followUps.summary: gap-5 app-side effect: blocking NEW debt creation for suspended businesses (collection never blocked) requires a check in src/debts/debts.service.ts POST /debts path - PROTECTED surface, explicitly OUT of admin scope. Until owner authorizes that fenced maintenance edit, Business.suspendedAt is recorded state only.

billing-need-2 store-fee/net breakdown has no ruled derivation (webhook bundle rows record amount 0). AdminBillingTransactionView ships storeFeeKobo/netKobo as honest null until the owner rules a derivation or capture.

On-device parse share is unknowable server-side (client heuristic never calls the API). Requires an app-side reporting change in OweMe-Mobile if ever wanted; ai-usage DTOs carry honest nulls meanwhile.

The 11 instrumentation entries above each add one write line to PROTECTED code paths and MUST run as a separate owner-gated fenced task with the full isolated contract suite + registry re-freeze, exactly like the 2026-07-21 maintenance pass. All admin read endpoints are contractually required to render truthfully from the empty tables until then.

writesExistingExceptions.note: The Phase 4 gate sanctions writesExisting only for the additive Business columns (isTest, enterpriseBands, suspendedAt, bvumCeilingOverride-derived) plus Business.plan. Five conventions-mandated actions cannot be expressed inside that list and are DECLARED here rather than hidden behind an empty writesExisting; each is additive-to-behavior via existing service semantics, superadmin- or support-gated per the matrix, and audit-logged.

exceptions.authority: conventions.md test-account tooling power 3 + triage business-detail-need-8 evidence (registry-mandated creditCredits semantics)
registry sideEffects warning that out-of-band plan edits diverge Business.plan from Subscription; conventions power 3 sales provisioning path

exceptions.writes: hard wipe of Debt/Payment/Reminder + CreditLedger reset for isTest businesses only
exceptions.authority: conventions.md power 4 (explicit owner approval, refuses on non-test)

exceptions.writes: Reminder.status/sentAt + CreditLedger 5-credit re-debit via existing retry semantics
exceptions.authority: conventions.md role matrix: support may resolve support issues (retry a reminder)

exceptions.writes: existing WebhooksService processing effects (Payment/Notification/Subscription), idempotent on reference
exceptions.authority: conventions.md role matrix: support may replay a webhook; triage pay-links-need-4
